/usr/sbin/c++ -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AuroraADT_shared.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libAuroraADT.so -o libAuroraADT.so CMakeFiles/AuroraADT_shared.dir/SmallVector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraADT_shared.dir/BitVector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraADT_shared.dir/Graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraADT_shared.dir/Allocator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraADT_shared.dir/SparseSet.cpp.o
